description: A concession stand manager reports they are running low on hot dog buns during a sold-out event.

nodes.task_description: Receive the request for more hot dog buns from the concession stand.

expected_outcome.value: Agent logs the request from Stand 14.

nodes.task_description: Check the inventory level of hot dog buns in the central storeroom.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms there are sufficient buns in stock.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch a runner to deliver two cases of buns from the storeroom to the concession stand.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates and assigns a delivery task to an available runner.
